title: My Product Is Too Complex for AI. Sure.
meta: Vertical 9:16 reel, ~20s. Featured brand: Saie. Inspired by mobileeditingclub (DRfi1_VCOnQ).
concept: A before-and-after objection-buster for Saie: the reel opens on a relatable Saie brand marketer on her phone, muttering 'my product is way too complicated for AI.' Then Masonry answers her, one product at a time. The product appears: Saie's Glowy Super Gel. Then the result: a model in a sun-drenched editorial, skin luminous. The product: Sunvisor SPF. The result: a desert campaign shot. The product: Dew Blush. The result: a close-up cheek flush that stops any scroll. The sequence proves that any Saie product, no matter how tactile or editorial its brand identity, can become a campaign asset in Masonry.
audio: Calm, clean lo-fi track with a satisfying pace. No voiceover. On-screen text 'the product' and 'the result' carry all the weight.

beats.ost: my product is way too complicated for AI
beats.visual: Three-frame sequence: a Saie marketer scrolling on her phone, skeptical, in a soft pink shirt in a bright interior. Text builds over three cuts as she voices the objection.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 0-2: 'my product is way too complicated for AI' across three portrait frames.

beats.visual: Cut to a clean studio shot: Saie Glowy Super Gel serum in a frosted minimalist bottle, on a neutral background, perfect light.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 3: 'the product' clean serum bottle on white.

beats.visual: Three-cut editorial sequence: warm amber and gold tones, model with glass skin holding the serum, then a portrait with a luminous complexion, then a tight close-up of the serum formula catching the light. All Masonry-generated.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 4-6: 'the result' across three editorial beauty cuts.

beats.visual: Cut to: Saie Sunvisor SPF sunscreen stick, simple and elegant, product shot against a soft neutral.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 7: 'the product' coat garment cut.

beats.visual: Two-cut portrait sequence: model with a dewy sun-kissed glow, editorial outdoor light, then a composed close-up with warm diffused tones. Campaign-ready.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 8-9: 'the result' across two coat-editorial model portraits.

beats.visual: Saie Dew Blush in a soft compact, clean and minimal against a cream background.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 10: 'the product' serum bottle close-up.

beats.visual: Two cuts: hands applying the blush in a natural movement (sec 11), then a drop of color formula catching warm backlight (sec 12). Textural, editorial, real.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 11-12: 'the result' serum application and drop macro.

beats.visual: Saie Mascara 001 in a clean cylindrical tube, placed simply on a soft surface.
Three editorial cuts: a hotel-suite styled flat-lay featuring the mascara (sec 14-15), then two desert-light portraits of a model with full lashes and clean skin (sec 16-17). Campaign-level quality.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 14-16: 'the result' hotel editorial and desert editorial sequence.

beats.ost: still think it's too complicated for Masonry?
beats.visual: Three closing cuts: Saie Tinted Moisturizer product shot on white (sec 17), then two desert editorial model shots: clean, warm, cinematic (sec 18-19). Rhetorical close. No answer needed.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 17-19: 'the product' bodysuit and 'the result' desert editorial portrait close.

notes: Saie is a stand-in demo brand: clean beauty, Sephora-stocked, known for glow-first complexion products with a strong editorial identity. All imagery is to be generated and assembled in Masonry. No media has been generated yet: generation is gated on separate approval per project policy.
